## Lite

- `save_manager.gd` no longer references Pro-only `SaveSecurity` at parse time (fixes pure Lite and the sample)
- Added `addons/savestate/encrypted_save_reader.gd` so Save Browser can inspect Pro-encrypted outer saves when keys exist

## Pro

- **Paid addon — not in this repo:** [SaveState Pro on itch.io](https://chuumberry.itch.io/savestate-pro)
- Repack your itch bundle with Lite **1.1.1** so editor health / dock behavior matches the Lite fix above
